title: Update readme for v1.0.0
body: Also bump gitvalidation epoch - we usually do this every release, but v1.0.0 is on a branch so we need a separate commit for master.

comments.body: Hold this until Monday, so we can get a blog on podman.io out to go with it.
:umbrella: The latest upstream changes (presumably #2145) made this pull request unmergeable. Please resolve the merge conflicts.
